Based on the information provided, Roger O. Egeberg served as Assistant Secretary for Health and Scientific Affairs in the Department of Health, Education, and Welfare (now the United States Department of Health and Human Services) during the Nixon administration. The Nixon administration lasted from January 20, 1969, to August 9, 1974.

<answer>1969 to 1974</answer>
